title: Lets add @rh-atomic-bot support so we can enforce tests pass before merging.
body: @jlebon @cgwalters How can we setup buildah to use rh-atomic-bot?

comments.body: You can open PR against https://github.com/jlebon/redhat-ci as described in the README. Specify in the PR whether you just want automated PR testing, or if you also want the merge bot (i.e. the `r+` functionality).
